The question is asking to determine the first stop of a given route where the route never pauses. Since the frequency column shows constant intervals (30 minutes) with no pauses indicated, we need to sort the destinations based on the route number to find the first stop. We can use the f_sort_column(route) operation with the order "small to large" to get the routes in numerical order and identify the first destination.
